summary: Clean audience recording with natural sound, but little information on the performance
review: The tape, sourced from two Nakamichi microphones feeding a Sony TC‑D5 cassette deck (Dolby B) and later digitized, is praised for its natural and clean sonic character. No details about the concert itself are provided, leaving the musical quality unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it rates the recording as natural and clean (good) but gives an overall 3‑star rating, with no commentary on the show itself.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Two Nakamichi mics > Sony TC‑D5 (Dolby B) chain; described as most natural and clean despite being an audience source.
